progressionMilestones.title: Logistics
progressionMilestones.description: Establish a 'Wolf-Proof' Mountain Outpost with a functional portal hub.

progressionMilestones.title: Exploration
progressionMilestones.description: Locate and clear at least 3 Frost Caves / Ruined Spires.

progressionMilestones.title: Gear Status
progressionMilestones.description: Craft and fully upgrade the Wolf Armor set and the Draugr Fang (or equivalent).

progressionMilestones.title: The Finale
progressionMilestones.description: Locate the sacrifice altar and defeat the Biome Boss (Moder).

narrativeAndEntertainmentGoals.title: The Vibe
narrativeAndEntertainmentGoals.description: Survival Against the Elements — Emphasize the danger of the cold and the verticality of the terrain.

narrativeAndEntertainmentGoals.title: Grand Project
narrativeAndEntertainmentGoals.description: Construct 'The Sky-Reach Tower,' a vertical base at the highest peak discovered.

narrativeAndEntertainmentGoals.title: Viewer Hook
narrativeAndEntertainmentGoals.description: Grandpa Bud vs. Gravity — A running tally of accidental falls or 'Death Runs.'

antiStagnationRules.title: The 2-Episode Limit
antiStagnationRules.description: If a specific resource (e.g., Silver Veins or Dragon Eggs) is not found within two consecutive episodes, the third episode MUST pivot to a 'Search & Rescue' theme or a community-driven 'Base Improvement' stream to avoid the 'Axe Grind' fatigue.
